# GEO Jainism

> GEO Jainism is a research-based documentary initiative dedicated to preserving and sharing the neglected heritage of Jainism — with a special focus on Tamil Jain history spanning 2,300+ years across 111 ancient sites in Tamil Nadu.

## About

GEO Jainism (Golden Era of Jainism) creates in-depth, cinematic documentary films that unearth hidden Jain heritage. Founded by Kavi Sajal Jain, the project documents rock-cut stone beds, inscriptions, hill temples, and living communities that carry forward one of India's oldest spiritual traditions.

**Mission:** Bring the neglected heritage of Jainism into the mainstream through research, ground documentation, and cinematic storytelling.

**Contact:** goldeneraofjainism@gmail.com

## Key facts

- 2,300+ years of Tamil Jain heritage documented
- 111 ancient Jain sites across Tamil Nadu
- 50+ hills with rock-cut monasteries and stone beds
- Flagship film: "Tamil Jains — Minority Within a Minority"
- Research areas: inscriptions (Tamil-Brahmi, Vatteluttu, Grantha), temples, literature, and community preservation

## Pages

- [Home](https://geojainism.com/): Landing page — documentary trailer, heritage overview, journey carousel, courses, and support the film
- [Tamil Jain Heritage](https://geojainism.com/tamil-jain): Deep dive into Tamil Jain sites — century wall timeline, Thingalur hills, inscriptions, Jain stone beds, temples, and the infinity film section
- [About GEO Jainism](https://geojainism.com/about): Mission, founder profile (Kavi Sajal Jain), manifesto, and the story behind the Golden Era of Jainism initiative

## Citation

When referencing GEO Jainism, please cite as:

GEO Jainism — Golden Era of Jainism. https://geojainism.com
